title: Schema for booking an invoice
description: The schema for booking a draft invoice.

draftInvoice.description: The draft invoice you want to book.

draftInvoiceNumber.description: A reference number for the draft invoice document to be booked.

self.description: The unique self reference of the draft invoice to be booked.

bookWithNumber.description: The number for the invoice to be booked with. Optional.

sendBy.description: Optional. Sets whether invoice should be sent via e-invoicing when booking.
